summary: Backend testing complete for Unsplash multi-step fallback logic. All 21 tests passed covering: fallback query generation, title simplification, lazy caching, API key security, and error handling.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper error handling and concurrency protection
Geographic patterns in _GEO_PATTERNS cover common Italian patterns (alla, al, della, di) but may need expansion for other cuisines
The 30-second lock TTL (_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS) is reasonable for preventing duplicate API calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Unsplash fallback logic tests pass. Test suite covers: 1) build_fallback_queries() returns correct 3-step chain (exact→simplified→cuisine), 2) _simplify_title() strips geo descriptors (alla, al, della, from, style, etc), 3) API key not exposed in responses, 4) Lazy caching works (same image on repeat requests), 5) Recipes without images get images assigned. Recipes tested: risotto-alla-milanese-italy (had image), coq-au-vin-france (got image via fallback).

unit_tests.TestFallbackQueryGeneration: 5/5 passed - exact query first, simplified second, cuisine last, no duplicates, handles missing country
unit_tests.TestFallbackQueryVariants: 2/2 passed - Italian alla recipes and simple dishes generate correct fallbacks

integration_tests.TestRecipeEndpointImageAssignment: 3/3 passed - existing images returned, API key not exposed, recipes without images get assigned
integration_tests.TestLazyCaching: 1/1 passed - second request returns same cached image
integration_tests.TestRecipeEcosystemEndpoint: 1/1 passed - recipes list includes image data
integration_tests.TestErrorHandling: 2/2 passed - 404 for invalid recipes, service configured
